redemptionType: Issuer redemption via USYC Teller into USDC
liquidityNotes: Official Hashnote documentation states that onboarded investors can subscribe and redeem through USYC Teller with USDC 24/7/365. Private Liquidity Teller can be configured for up to 100% instant liquidity into USDC, but additional fees apply and exact terms are private. RWA.xyz lists redemption time as U.S. banking daily, minimum redemption amount as 0 USDC, and redemption description as within +1 business day of redemption request. Hashnote official fee docs list redemption fee as 3 bps, while RWA.xyz displays 0% redemption fees; this is treated as a source conflict or possible effective/waived fee, so official 3 bps is retained. No verified DEX pairs, open onchain liquidity amount, or bid-ask spread were found.

_meta.notes: Liquidity data combines official Hashnote docs for redemption mechanics and fee schedule with RWA.xyz for minimum redemption amount and +1 business day redemption description. liquidityScore remains conservative because DEX liquidity, bid-ask spread, instant-capacity thresholds, and private liquidity pricing are incomplete.
